<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="th">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>Mitr Phol – Trend Analysis March 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sarabun:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:root{--acc:#1a78c2;--acc2:#0d5a96;--gold:#d97706;--border:#e2e8f0;--bg:#f8fafc;--surf:#ffffff;--txt:#1e293b;--dim:#64748b;--muted:#94a3b8}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;height:100dvh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}

/* TOP BAR */
.topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;gap:10px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}
.bicon{width:28px;height:28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a78c2,#00aaff);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
.btxt{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt);line-height:1.2}
.bsub{font-size:9px;color:var(--dim);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace}
.tnav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;flex:1;justify-content:center}
.nbtn{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--dim);padding:5px 14px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;transition:.15s;touch-action:manipulation}
.nbtn:active{background:var(--border)}
.pind{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;padding:5px 10px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);min-width:60px;text-align:center}
.tcbtn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a78c2,#0d5a96);border:none;color:#fff;padding:6px 13px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;touch-action:manipulation}
.tcbtn:active{filter:brightness(.9)}

/* MAIN */
.main{display:flex;flex:1;overflow:hidden}

/* VIEWER */
.viewer{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:12px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg)}
.scon{position:relative;max-width:100%;max-height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.simg{max-width:100%;max-height:calc(100dvh - 120px);border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.06);object-fit:contain;display:block}
.snav{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 4px;pointer-events:none}
.sarr{background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--txt);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;pointer-events:all;font-size:18px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1);touch-action:manipulation}
.sarr:active{background:var(--bg)}
.sarr:disabled{opacity:.2;cursor:default}

/* THUMBNAILS */
.tstrip{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:7px 12px;overflow-x:auto;background:#fff;border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;scrollbar-width:none;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.tstrip::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.th{flex-shrink:0;width:52px;height:36px;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;opacity:.45;transition:.15s;touch-action:manipulation}
.th:active{opacity:.8}.th.active{border-color:var(--acc);opacity:1}
.th img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}

/* CHAT PANEL - desktop side, mobile bottom sheet */
.cpanel{width:360px;min-width:360px;background:#fff;border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:.3s;overflow:hidden}
.cpanel.hidden{width:0;min-width:0;border-left:none}

.chdr{padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:#fff}
.chdr h3{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.aibadge{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a78c2,#00aaff);color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.4px}
.chdr p{font-size:10px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.4}

.cmsgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.msg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px}
.mrole{font-size:9px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px}
.msg.user .mrole{color:var(--acc)}.msg.assistant .mrole{color:var(--gold)}
.mbub{padding:9px 11px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7}
.msg.user .mbub{background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;color:var(--txt)}
.msg.assistant .mbub{background:#fffbeb;border:1px solid #fde68a;color:var(--txt)}
.stag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;background:#fef3c7;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;margin-bottom:5px}

.tind{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:9px 11px;background:#fffbeb;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:8px;width:fit-content}
.dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;animation:bounce 1.2s infinite}
.dot:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s}.dot:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s}
@keyframes bounce{0%,60%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}30%{transform:translateY(-5px)}}

.qq{padding:7px 10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:#fff}
.qqlbl{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:.5px}
.qqgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4px}
.qqbtn{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--dim);padding:5px 7px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;line-height:1.35;transition:.15s;touch-action:manipulation}
.qqbtn:active{background:#eff6ff;border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--txt)}

.cia{padding:9px 10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;display:flex;gap:7px;background:#fff}
.cinp{flex:1;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 11px;font-size:13px;font-family:'Sarabun',sans-serif;color:var(--txt);resize:none;outline:none;min-height:36px;max-height:90px;line-height:1.4;-webkit-appearance:none}
.cinp:focus{border-color:var(--acc);background:#fff}
.cinp::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
.sbtn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a78c2,#0d5a96);border:none;border-radius:8px;width:36px;height:36px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;font-size:15px;align-self:flex-end;touch-action:manipulation}
.sbtn:active{filter:brightness(.9)}.sbtn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:default}

/* MOBILE BOTTOM SHEET */
@media(max-width:640px){
  .cpanel{
    position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
    width:100%!important;min-width:0!important;
    border-left:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;
    box-shadow:0 -4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    height:55dvh;
    transform:translateY(0);
    transition:transform .3s ease;
    z-index:100;
  }
  .cpanel.hidden{
    transform:translateY(100%);
    width:100%!important;
    border-top:none;
  }
  .chdr{border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;padding-top:14px}
  .chdr::before{content:'';display:block;width:36px;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin:0 auto 10px}
  .viewer{padding:10px 10px 6px}
  .simg{max-height:calc(100dvh - 220px)}
  .tstrip{padding:6px 10px}
  .th{width:44px;height:30px}
  .qqgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}
  .qq{padding:6px 10px}
  .main{flex-direction:column}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="topbar">
  <div class="brand">
    <div class="bicon">M</div>
    <div>
      <div class="btxt">Mitr Phol Group</div>
      <div class="bsub">PROCUREMENT · MAR 2026</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tnav">
    <button class="nbtn" onclick="prev()">&#8592;</button>
    <div class="pind" id="pind">1 / 12</div>
    <button class="nbtn" onclick="next()">&#8594;</button>
  </div>
  <button class="tcbtn" onclick="toggleChat()">🤖 AI</button>
</div>

<div class="main">
  <div class="viewer">
    <div class="scon">
      <img class="simg" id="simg" src="" alt="Slide"/>
      <div class="snav">
        <button class="sarr" id="bp" onclick="prev()">&#8249;</button>
        <button class="sarr" id="bn" onclick="next()">&#8250;</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cpanel hidden" id="cp">
    <div class="chdr">
      <h3>Procurement AI Advisor <span class="aibadge">AI + WEB</span></h3>
      <p>ถามเกี่ยวกับรายงาน หรือขอกลยุทธ์ Procurement พร้อมข้อมูลตลาดล่าสุด</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cmsgs" id="cms">
      <div class="msg assistant">
        <div class="mrole">AI ADVISOR</div>
        <div class="mbub">
          <div class="stag">📄 Trend Analysis Mar 2026</div>
          สวัสดีครับ! พร้อมตอบคำถามเกี่ยวกับ:<br>
          • วิกฤต Hormuz &amp; Supply Chain<br>
          • ราคา ทองแดง เหล็ก โซลาร์ พลาสติก ไม้สับ<br>
          • กลยุทธ์ Procurement Positioning<br><br>
          ถามได้เลยครับ!
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="qq">
      <div class="qqlbl">QUICK QUESTIONS</div>
      <div class="qqgrid">
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('สรุปผลกระทบวิกฤต Hormuz ต่องานจัดซื้อทุกหมวด')">⚠️ Hormuz</button>
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('แนวโน้มราคาทองแดง LME และกลยุทธ์แนะนำ')">🔶 ทองแดง</button>
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('สรุป Procurement Positioning ทุกหมวดสินค้า')">📋 Strategy</button>
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('ควรเพิ่ม Safety Stock อะไรบ้างในสถานการณ์นี้')">📦 Stock</button>
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('ผลกระทบ VAT Rebate จีนต่อราคา Solar Cells')">☀️ Solar</button>
        <button class="qqbtn" onclick="ask('กลยุทธ์บริหาร Lead Time ในสถานการณ์ปัจจุบัน')">🚢 Lead Time</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cia">
      <textarea class="cinp" id="ci" placeholder="ถามคำถามด้าน Procurement..." rows="1"
        onkeydown="hk(event)" oninput="ar(this)"></textarea>
      <button class="sbtn" id="sb" onclick="send()">&#10148;</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tstrip" id="ts"></div>

<script>
const PG=["", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", ""];
const DC="MITR PHOL GROUP - TREND ANALYSIS \u0e14\u0e49\u0e32\u0e19\u0e08\u0e31\u0e14\u0e0b\u0e37\u0e49\u0e2d \u0e21\u0e35\u0e19\u0e32\u0e04\u0e21 2026\nGEOPOLITICAL RISK: \u0e0a\u0e48\u0e2d\u0e07\u0e41\u0e04\u0e1a\u0e2e\u0e2d\u0e23\u0e4c\u0e21\u0e38\u0e0b - \u0e1b\u0e23\u0e34\u0e21\u0e32\u0e13\u0e40\u0e14\u0e34\u0e19\u0e40\u0e23\u0e37\u0e2d\u0e25\u0e14\u0e25\u0e07 70%, \u0e40\u0e23\u0e37\u0e2d 150 \u0e25\u0e33\u0e08\u0e2d\u0e14\u0e23\u0e2d, \u0e1b\u0e23\u0e30\u0e01\u0e31\u0e19\u0e20\u0e31\u0e22\u0e16\u0e2d\u0e19\u0e04\u0e27\u0e32\u0e21\u0e04\u0e38\u0e49\u0e21\u0e04\u0e23\u0e2d\u0e07\nFREIGHT: Asia-ME +15-25%, Insurance +50-100%, Transit +10-21 \u0e27\u0e31\u0e19, Air Freight +20-40%, Buffer Lead Time +14-21 \u0e27\u0e31\u0e19\nCOPPER LME: Jan 13,100 / Feb 13,200 / Mar 14,000 USD/ton. COMEX stock >500,000 ton. \u0e04\u0e32\u0e14 $13,000-13,500/ton. Lock 60% 3\u0e40\u0e14\u0e37\u0e2d\u0e19 + Floating 40% Price Cap\nSTEEL: \u0e40\u0e2b\u0e25\u0e47\u0e01\u0e19\u0e33\u0e40\u0e02\u0e49\u0e32 70% \u0e02\u0e2d\u0e07\u0e44\u0e17\u0e22 \u0e23\u0e32\u0e04\u0e32\u0e15\u0e32\u0e21\u0e08\u0e35\u0e19. Anti-Dumping \u0e40\u0e02\u0e49\u0e21\u0e02\u0e36\u0e49\u0e19. Q2 \u0e41\u0e19\u0e27\u0e42\u0e19\u0e49\u0e21\u0e2a\u0e39\u0e07\u0e02\u0e36\u0e49\u0e19. \u0e40\u0e08\u0e23\u0e08\u0e32\u0e15\u0e23\u0e36\u0e07\u0e23\u0e32\u0e04\u0e32 Supplier \u0e44\u0e17\u0e22 3 \u0e40\u0e14\u0e37\u0e2d\u0e19\nSOLAR: VAT Rebate 9% \u0e16\u0e39\u0e01\u0e22\u0e01\u0e40\u0e25\u0e34\u0e01 1 \u0e40\u0e21.\u0e22. 2026 \u0e15\u0e49\u0e19\u0e17\u0e38\u0e19\u0e2a\u0e48\u0e07\u0e2d\u0e2d\u0e01\u0e08\u0e35\u0e19 +8-10%. TOPCon FOB $0.115-0.120/W, Forward Q2 $0.128-0.130/W. Lock 100% critical projects\nPLASTIC: HDPE 36.5, PP 34, LLDPE 37, PET 32, LDPE 43 \u0e1a\u0e32\u0e17/\u0e01\u0e01. Buyer's Market. Naphtha Risk 4-8 \u0e2a\u0e31\u0e1b\u0e14\u0e32\u0e2b\u0e4c. Hold stock \u0e15\u0e48\u0e33 + \u0e2a\u0e31\u0e0d\u0e0d\u0e32 3 \u0e40\u0e14\u0e37\u0e2d\u0e19\nWOOD CHIP: Supply \u0e15\u0e36\u0e07 \u0e20\u0e32\u0e04\u0e43\u0e15\u0e49\u0e1f\u0e37\u0e49\u0e19\u0e15\u0e31\u0e27\u0e0a\u0e49\u0e32. Diesel \u0e41\u0e1e\u0e07\u0e02\u0e36\u0e49\u0e19\u0e01\u0e23\u0e30\u0e17\u0e1a\u0e15\u0e49\u0e19\u0e17\u0e38\u0e19 2-4 \u0e2a\u0e31\u0e1b\u0e14\u0e32\u0e2b\u0e4c. Lock Volume 60-70% Q2 + Fuel Adjustment Clause";
let cur=0,vis=false,busy=false,hist=[];

function init(){
  const s=document.getElementById('ts');
  PG.forEach((b,i)=>{
    const d=document.createElement('div');
    d.className='th'+(i===0?' active':'');
    d.onclick=()=>go(i);
    const img=document.createElement('img');
    img.src='data:image/jpeg;base64,'+b;
    d.appendChild(img);s.appendChild(d);
  });
  go(0);

  // Swipe support
  let sx=0,sy=0;
  const v=document.querySelector('.viewer');
  v.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{sx=e.touches[0].clientX;sy=e.touches[0].clientY},{passive:true});
  v.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{
    const dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-sx;
    const dy=Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientY-sy);
    if(Math.abs(dx)>50&&dy<50){if(dx<0)next();else prev();}
  },{passive:true});
}

function go(i){
  cur=i;
  document.getElementById('simg').src='data:image/jpeg;base64,'+PG[i];
  document.getElementById('pind').textContent=(i+1)+' / '+PG.length;
  document.getElementById('bp').disabled=i===0;
  document.getElementById('bn').disabled=i===PG.length-1;
  document.querySelectorAll('.th').forEach((t,j)=>t.classList.toggle('active',j===i));
  document.getElementById('ts').children[i].scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',inline:'center',block:'nearest'});
}
function prev(){if(cur>0)go(cur-1)}
function next(){if(cur<PG.length-1)go(cur+1)}

document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(e.target===document.getElementById('ci'))return;
  if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')prev();if(e.key==='ArrowRight')next();
});

function toggleChat(){
  vis=!vis;
  document.getElementById('cp').classList.toggle('hidden',!vis);
}

function ar(el){el.style.height='auto';el.style.height=Math.min(el.scrollHeight,90)+'px'}
function hk(e){if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();send()}}
function ask(q){
  if(!vis)toggleChat();
  setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('ci').value=q;send();},100);
}

function esc(s){return s.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')}

function addMsg(r,c){
  const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='msg '+r;
  const tag=r==='assistant'?'<div class="stag">🔧 Procurement</div>':'';
  d.innerHTML=`<div class="mrole">${r==='user'?'YOU':'AI ADVISOR'}</div><div class="mbub">${tag}${esc(c).replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}</div>`;
  const cm=document.getElementById('cms');cm.appendChild(d);cm.scrollTop=cm.scrollHeight;
}

function showT(){
  const d=document.createElement('div');d.id='ti';d.className='msg assistant';
  d.innerHTML='<div class="mrole">AI ADVISOR</div><div class="tind"><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div></div>';
  const cm=document.getElementById('cms');cm.appendChild(d);cm.scrollTop=cm.scrollHeight;
}
function hideT(){const e=document.getElementById('ti');if(e)e.remove()}

async function send(){
  if(busy)return;
  const inp=document.getElementById('ci');
  const q=inp.value.trim();if(!q)return;
  inp.value='';inp.style.height='auto';
  busy=true;document.getElementById('sb').disabled=true;
  addMsg('user',q);hist.push({role:'user',content:q});showT();
  const sys=`You are an expert Procurement Strategy Advisor for Mitr Phol Group.
Report data: ${DC}
Answer in Thai if user writes Thai. Be specific with numbers. Focus on procurement strategy, risk, contracts. Keep answers concise for mobile reading.`;
  try{
    const r=await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{
      method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:600,system:sys,
        tools:[{type:'web_search_20250305',name:'web_search'}],messages:hist.slice(-8)})
    });
    const data=await r.json();hideT();
    let txt='';
    if(data.content)for(const b of data.content)if(b.type==='text')txt+=b.text;
    if(!txt)txt='ขออภัย ไม่สามารถประมวลผลได้ กรุณาลองใหม่';
    hist.push({role:'assistant',content:txt});addMsg('assistant',txt);
  }catch(e){hideT();addMsg('assistant','Error: '+e.message);}
  busy=false;document.getElementById('sb').disabled=false;
}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>
